subcodes.first_line: O noble descendant of that illustrious man! I have intoned the verses of thy submission and humility before God, and I beseech [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها السلیل المجید لذلک الرجل الجلیل انی رتلت ایات خضوعک و خشوعک لله و اسئل
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @stories; anecdotes, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
